overview: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee), founded in 1847 as Thomason College of Engineering, is one of India's oldest and most prestigious technical institutions. Known for academic excellence and strong placement outcomes, it spans across diverse fields like engineering, applied sciences, and management.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A++' accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC (income > ₹5 lakh). Income-based and caste-based waivers apply.
₹5,000 per semester for General/OBC (non-sponsored). Sponsored: ₹25,000. SC/ST/PwD are exempt.

placements.companiesVisited: Databricks, Google, Microsoft, DE Shaw, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments, Adobe, Goldman Sachs
placements.internationalOffers: Offers up to ₹2.05 Cr CPA in 2025 Phase 1

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level exams like JEE Advanced (UG), GATE (PG), and followed by JoSAA/COAP counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA/COAP schedule and IIT Roorkee's academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Other semester fees (~₹53,300) cover hostel, mess, and other charges. SC/ST students (income < ₹5L) may receive free messing and rent waivers. One-time admission fee: ₹6,000.
